interaction_phrase: working collaboratively with partners at Microsoft
occurrence_sentence: Krishnamoorthy, Kowalski, and their PNNL colleagues are working collaboratively with partners at Microsoft, through the [Northwest Quantum Nexus](https://pnnl-my.sharepoint.com/personal/karyn_hede_pnnl_gov/Documents/ACMDD%20-%20Nathan%20Baker/Quantum%20leadership/nwquantum.com), to both simulate how a quantum computer will work and write programs that will work on any quantum computer that emerges from the intense global competition.
